paivot-sr-pm.description: Creates comprehensive backlog from D&F documents with embedded context. Also the ONLY agent authorized to create bugs -- receives DISCOVERED_BUG reports, creates fully structured bugs with AC, epic placement, and dependency chain.

paivot-pm.description: Evidence-based review of delivered stories; accepts or rejects with detailed notes. Ephemeral -- spawned for one delivered story, then disposed.

paivot-developer.description: Implements story with tests; records proof of passing tests; marks delivered via nd status transition. Ephemeral -- spawned for one story, then disposed.

paivot-architect.description: Designs system architecture; owns ARCHITECTURE.md. Part of the Balanced Leadership Team. Asks clarifying questions about technical constraints via QUESTIONS_FOR_USER blocks.

paivot-designer.description: Captures user needs and DX for ALL product types (UI, API, CLI, database); owns DESIGN.md. Part of the Balanced Leadership Team.

paivot-business-analyst.description: Captures business outcomes through iterative questioning rounds; owns BUSINESS.md. Part of the Balanced Leadership Team.

paivot-anchor.description: Adversarial reviewer in two modes: (1) BACKLOG REVIEW -- find gaps, missing walking skeletons, horizontal layers. (2) MILESTONE REVIEW -- validate real delivery, inspect tests for mocks.

paivot-retro.description: Harvests learnings from completed epics; writes actionable insights to .vault/knowledge/ with actionable: pending tag.

piv-init.description: Initialize project with git, nd, nd FSM, and D&F document structure

piv-start.description: Single execution pass -- find ready work and dispatch agents

piv-loop.description: Run unattended execution loop until complete or blocked

piv-cancel-loop.description: Cancel active execution loop and report backlog state

piv-recover.description: Recover from crash or inconsistent state using pvg + nd doctor

piv-retro.description: Manually invoke a retrospective on a completed epic

piv-code-review.description: Comprehensive code audit (tests, mocks, modularity, security)

intake.description: Capture UX/visual/functional feedback and turn it into a prioritized backlog

vault-status.description: Show Obsidian vault health -- note counts by folder, recent notes, pending proposals

vault-evolve.description: Refine vault-backed content based on session experience

vault-capture.description: Trigger deliberate knowledge capture pass to vault

vault-triage.description: Review and accept/reject pending proposals for system-scoped vault notes
